title: JoinReply
description: Server's reply to `phx_join`. Seeds the client with the most recent 50 messages + the cluster metadata.

messages.description: Most-recent-50 history, oldest first. Cache-hit preferred.

source.description: Where the seed history came from — same semantics as history_reply.source.

region.description: The region this gateway reports as (e.g. `iad`). Use it to pick the right region in the SDK config next time.

node.description: Erlang node name that served the join. Useful when debugging distributed behavior.
